sections.heading: Functional Approval
sections.bodyMd:
EMV functional approval assesses that payment products and solutions meet EMV® Specifications for performance and compatibility.

[Card & Mobile](https://www.emvco.com/approved-products/?type=card_and_mobile) [Acceptance Devices](https://www.emvco.com/approved-products/?type=acceptance_device) [EMV® 3-D Secure](https://www.emvco.com/approved-products/?type=3-d_secure)
